response.overview: These diaries were published the day after the latest war, on March 3, 2026. Not a war of destruction, bloodshed, and live killing, but rather of the pain of loss and inability to return that the Lebanese have inherited through wars, and especially the attachment to what remains of their places and intimate things, which are vulnerable to being erased. Over the past months, these diaries were recorded on a mobile phone and served as an exercise in survival, an attempt to cling to what remained of the images… and songs, the last vestiges of a fading passion.
response.title: يوميات حرب
